name: ExtensionEvidenceVariable_Characteristic_TimeFromEvent_Range
title: R5: Used to express the observation within a period before and/or after the event (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.range` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.range` 0..1 `Range`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.range` 0..1 `Range`
*  R4B: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromStart.range` 0..1 `Range`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.range` is part of an existing definition because parent element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent` requires an extension for additional cardinality.
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.range` has a context of EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromStart based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.timeFromEvent.range` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
